description_long: This object is a compact, pole-mounted traffic light with a vertical arrangement of three signal lights housed in a rounded rectangular enclosure. The enclosure is bordered by a yellow frame and features three protruding visors or hoods over each signal light to shield them from sunlight. The pole is striped in alternating yellow and black bands, with a blue label or sticker affixed near the lower section. The base of the pole is cylindrical and appears reinforced, likely for stability. The rear of the enclosure is flat and features mounting brackets for attachment to the pole. The overall design is utilitarian, with materials and colors chosen for high visibility and durability in urban environments.
description: A compact, vertically stacked traffic light with a yellow-bordered enclosure and three signal lights, mounted on a striped pole with a reinforced base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow-bordered enclosure and the three signal lights stacked vertically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the protruding visors over each signal light and the mounting brackets on the enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back of the enclosure and the mounting hardware, with the pole and base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the visors and the pole's striped pattern, as well as the blue label near the base.
